type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: My task: add transform_callback param to exif_transpose in ImageOps.py. I need to touch ImageOps.py and test_imageops.py. What files does your feature touch?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Same files, unavoidable overlap since both features touch exif_transpose. Let's each add our new param at the end of the signature (after existing params), keep our logic in a distinct/appended block, and add new test functions (not editing existing ones) to minimize merge conflicts. I'll resolve conflicts manually during merge of team/agent2.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Our features both touch exif_transpose signature/body in the same file, so full disjointness isn't possible. Proposal: I'll implement transform_callback now, keeping the change additive (new keyword-only param, default None, only used to override the method lookup dict; doesn't touch strip_metadata concerns). Please add your strip_metadata param as its own additive keyword-only param too. When merging, we'll hand-resolve the exif_transpose signature to include both params + both docstring entries + both test additions. Sound OK? Reply ACCEPT and I'll start.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Agreed. I'll add transform_callback as a new keyword-only param after in_place, add new test functions only, and handle merge conflicts on my end too when I pull team/agent1.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Agreed. I'll add strip_metadata as an additive keyword-only param with default False, only used at the end of exif_transpose to strip all metadata after transpose. New test functions only, won't touch existing ones. Will hand-resolve merge conflicts. Starting implementation now.

type: DONE

note: Finished strip_metadata param in exif_transpose (additive keyword-only, default False). Signature/overloads updated, logic appended after existing transpose/orientation-removal logic in all 3 branches (transpose, in_place no-transpose, non-in_place no-transpose). Added new test function test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata, did not touch existing tests. All 35 tests in test_imageops.py pass. Ready to merge whenever you are.
